ast.source: Click once more to confirm removal

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a secret as token for this repository (optional)
ast.target: 为此仓库选择一个令牌（可选）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled beta plugins will be automatically enabled after installtion by default. Note: you can toggle this on and off for each plugin in the "Add Plugin" form.
ast.target: 如果启用，测试版插件将在安装后默认自动启用。注意：你可以在“添加插件”表单中为每个插件单独开关此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled all beta plugins will be checked for updates each time Obsidian starts. Note: this does not update frozen version plugins.
ast.target: 如果启用，每次 Obsidian 启动时都会检查所有测试版插件的更新。注意：这不更新冻结版本的插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled all beta themes will be checked for updates each time Obsidian starts.
ast.target: 如果启用，每次 Obsidian 启动时都会检查所有测试版主题的更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled the latest version will be selected by default when adding a new plugin.
ast.target: 如果启用，添加新插件时将默认选择最新版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, plugins with higher app versions will be allowed to be installed. Also it allows desktop-only plugins to be installed on mobile devices.
ast.target: 如果启用，将允许安装需要更高应用版本的插件。同时，也允许在移动设备上安装仅限桌面的插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: BRAT will provide popup notifications for its various activities. Turn this off means  no notifications from BRAT.
ast.target: BRAT 会为其各种活动提供弹出通知。关闭此选项意味着不会收到来自 BRAT 的通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Plugin updates will be logged to a file in the log file.
ast.target: 插件更新将记录到日志文件中的文件中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Logs will be saved to this file. Don't add .md to the file name.
ast.target: 日志将保存到此文件。不要在文件名中添加 .md。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get a lot  more information in  the log.
ast.target: 在日志中获取更多信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Atomic Bomb level console logging. Can be used for troubleshooting and development.
ast.target: 原子弹级别的控制台日志记录。可用于故障排除和开发。

ast.target: 错误：此仓库中未找到任何发布版本。

ast.source: Repository not found. Check the address or provide a valid token for access to a private repository.
ast.target: 未找到仓库。请检查地址，或提供有效的令牌以访问私有仓库。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Access denied. Check your personal access token.
ast.target: 访问被拒绝。请检查您的个人访问令牌。

ast.name: message

ast.target: 令牌缺少所需的作用域。请查看文档了解要求。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The following is a list of beta plugins added via the command "Add a beta plugin for testing". You can chose to add the latest version or a frozen version. A frozen version is a specific release of a plugin based on its release tag.
ast.target: 以下是通过命令“添加一个用于测试的Beta插件”添加的Beta插件列表。您可以选择添加最新版本或冻结版本。冻结版本是基于插件发布标签的特定版本。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click the 'Edit' button next to a plugin to change the installed version and the x button next to a plugin to remove it from the list.
ast.target: 点击插件旁边的“编辑”按钮可更改安装版本，点击插件旁边的x按钮可将其从列表中移除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Removing from the list does not delete the plugin, this should be done from the Community Plugins tab in Settings.
ast.target: 从列表中移除不会删除插件，此操作应在设置中的社区插件选项卡中完成。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Token name configured but secret is missing. Add the secret or update the plugin configuration.
ast.target: 令牌名称已配置但密钥缺失。请添加密钥或更新插件配置。
